ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., CompareNETObjects, log4net) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component (e.g., 3.05.0.0, 2.0.5) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the component (e.g., Binary) */,
  "license_terms_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license terms associated with the component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type (e.g., library, framework) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the component */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the component */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* Download URL of the component */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the component (e.g., SHA-256) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_license_terms_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_terms_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_terms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_terms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license (e.g., Microsoft Public License (MS-PL), Apache License 2.0) */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Text of the license agreement */,
  "link_to_license_terms" TEXT /* Link to the license agreement */,
  "is_osi_approved" INTEGER /* Is the license OSI-approved? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_terms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the history entry */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component at the time of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "related_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related component */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., dependency, compatible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_relationships_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_relationships_related_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit event */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit event (e.g., access, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, license issue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the compliance entry */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., security vulnerability, license issue) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_compliance_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the metadata entry */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry (e.g., dependency, tag) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_metadata_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the vulnerability */,
  "cve_id" TEXT /* CVE ID of the vulnerability */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the vulnerability (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vulnerability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_vulnerabilities_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_licenses_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the usage entry */,
  "license_terms_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license associated with the usage entry */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., commercial, personal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_licenses_usage_license_terms_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_terms_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_terms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_licenses_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
